channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Accel raises $5 billion for AI as venture capital bets reach infrastructure scale
item.description: In short: Accel has raised $5 billion in new capital, comprising a $4 billion Leaders Fund V and a $650 million sidecar, targeting 20-25 late-stage AI investments at an average cheque size of $200 million. The raise follows standout returns from its Anthropic… [Anthropic]

item.title: IREN Limited Stock 2026 Outlook: Analysts Say Buy as AI Pivot Targets $3.4B ARR Despite Bitcoin Volatility
item.description: NEW YORK — IREN Limited, the Nasdaq-listed former Bitcoin miner now aggressively pivoting to AI cloud infrastructure, presents a high-risk, high-reward opportunity in 2026 as the company targets $3.4 billion in annualized run-rate revenue from GPU-based AI se… [ServiceNow]

item.title: AI-Driven Innovation Transforms $15 Billion Carbon Fiber Market as Industry Giants Deploy Smart Manufacturing Systems
item.description: Artificial intelligence is revolutionizing carbon fiber manufacturing, driving unprecedented investment activity and operational improvements across globe. [Intel]

item.title: GOOG Dips 0.5% as Alphabet Awaits Q1 Earnings Amid AI Spending and Iran Relief Rally
item.description: NEW YORK — Alphabet Inc. Class C shares edged lower in early trading Wednesday, dipping 0.47 percent to $329.01 as investors paused ahead of the company's first-quarter earnings later this month while weighing heavy artificial intelligence investments against… [Alphabet, Intel]

item.title: AI Data Centers Market Size to Lead USD 197.57 Billion by 2035 Rising Adoption of AI Workloads is Driving Demand for Advanced Data Center Infrastructure
item.description: The globe AI data centers market size is expected to be lead USD 197.57 billion by 2035, increasing from USD 17.43 billion in 2025, with a strong CAGR of 27.48% from 2026 to 2035. The globe AI data centers market size is expected to be lead USD 197.57 billion…

item.title: Allbirds Becomes NewBird in Pivot From Shoes to AI
item.description: Allbirds made a name for itself with its shoes fashioned from merino wool. Now, it wants to be known as an AI company. The retailer announced that pivot Wednesday (April 15), saying it had struck a deal to raise $50 million to help it transition its business … [ServiceNow]

item.title: The hidden menace behind Big Tech’s AI arms race: Meta, Amazon and others are spending billions on hardware that’s worthless in 3 years
item.description: The new industrial era may be a lot more beneficial to the folks and businesses that use the AI-enhanced products than the enterprises that furnish them. [Amazon, Meta]

item.title: CoreWeave signs $6B deal with Jane Street to provide AI compute power
item.description: CoreWeave has announced a $6 billion deal with trading firm Jane Street to provide the firm with AI computing power for its trading strategy.

item.title: Jane Street commits $6 billion to CoreWeave and takes a $1 billion equity stake
item.description: In short: Jane Street has signed a $6 billion AI cloud agreement with CoreWeave and taken a $1 billion equity stake at $109 per share, making the quantitative trading firm one of CoreWeave’s five largest shareholders. The deal provides Jane Street with access…
